name: Call Tracking (Django) - Telnyx
description: Call Tracking in Django with Telnyx

TELNYX_API_KEY.description: Your Telnyx API Key v2, you can find at: https://portal.telnyx.com/#/app/api-keys

TELNYX_CONNECTION_ID.description: The Connection ID for your TeXML Application. Create one at: https://portal.telnyx.com/#/app/voice/texml

DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE.description: Instructs our app to use the production settings module

DJANGO_SECRET_KEY.description: A unique, unpredictable key for your Django app
